title: Daily Snapshot
description: The structured daily input object collected before each session. All downstream agents consume this — do not interpret data in this layer, only collect and validate.

hrv_ms.description: Heart rate variability in milliseconds, from Apple Health or wearable. Use the overnight/morning reading, not a spot check. If Apple Health and wearable conflict, Apple Health reading wins.

rhr_bpm.description: Resting heart rate in beats per minute, from Apple Health morning reading.

rhr_7day_avg.description: 7-day rolling average resting heart rate. Used to compute rhr_delta. Pulled from Apple Health weekly average.

rhr_delta.description: Computed field: rhr_bpm minus rhr_7day_avg. Positive = elevated above baseline. Populated automatically — do not ask user for this.

sleep_hours.description: Total sleep time in hours from last night, from Apple Health.

sleep_quality.description: Subjective sleep quality rating. 1 = very poor, 5 = excellent. Optional — if not provided, sleep_hours is the primary signal.

cycle_day.description: Current day of menstrual cycle. Day 1 = first day of period. Used to determine cycle phase in cycle-phase.yaml.

subjective_energy.description: How does the user feel right now, energy-wise? 1 = exhausted, 10 = excellent. This can override or flag conflicts with objective signals — a HIGH HRV with energy 2/10 should trigger a MODERATE readiness flag.

equipment_available.description: What equipment is accessible today. Defaults to home_gym on non-Tuesday days and planet_fitness on Tuesdays — confirm if different.

soreness.description: Optional muscle group soreness map. Informs exercise selection to avoid stacking load on acutely sore tissue.

notes.description: Freetext. Anything else relevant — sick, stressed, unusual schedule, medication changes, travel. This is read by the Plan Agent for context.
